meta.name: Muhammed Sahal
meta.role: Flutter Developer · Mobile Engineer · Full Stack
meta.tagline: Flutter developer crafting exceptional mobile experiences
meta.cornerLabel: FLUTTER DEVELOPER · MOBILE ENGINEER · CLEAN ARCHITECTURE

about.sectionSubtitle: Flutter developer crafting exceptional mobile experiences
about.heading: Building mobile experiences that scale & perform
bio: Senior Flutter Developer with 5+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance mobile applications for iOS and Android. Specialized in Flutter architecture, state management (BLoC, Riverpod, Provider), and building smooth, production-grade user experiences.

Experienced in integrating REST APIs, real-time services, and AI-powered features into modern mobile apps. Also skilled in backend development using Node.js (Express) and Django, working with MySQL and MongoDB, and managing CI/CD pipelines and end-to-end app store deployments.

projects.name: AI Chat Bot
projects.description: Conversational AI chatbot built with Flutter, powered by OpenAI models. Natural language understanding, context-aware responses, and a polished mobile UI with smooth animations.

projects.name: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: Cross-platform analytics dashboard with live data streaming. Built at Bitroot — real-time KPI tracking, interactive charts, and multi-device support across iOS, Android, and web.

projects.name: Multi-Platform Mobile App
projects.description: Full-featured cross-platform application running on iOS, Android, and web from a single Flutter codebase. Complex state management with Provider, BLoC, and Riverpod patterns.

projects.name: CI/CD Pipeline System
projects.description: Automated CI/CD pipeline for Flutter apps — build, test, and deploy to App Store & Play Store. Integrated with GitHub Actions, custom scripts, and environment management.

projects.name: CRM Web Application
projects.description: Customer relationship management system built with Django. Contact management, activity tracking, pipeline views, reporting, and cloud hosting on AWS EC2.

projects.name: Custom Widget Library
projects.description: Collection of production-ready Flutter widgets reused across multiple projects. Includes OTP input, country picker, custom timers, dropdown overlays, and animated skill bars.

projects.name: Serverless REST API
projects.description: Scalable serverless REST API backend powering mobile applications. Built with Node.js/Express on AWS, MongoDB for data, authentication, real-time endpoints, and auto-scaling.

componentLibrary.name: OTP Input
componentLibrary.description: Animated OTP input with auto-focus, paste detection, and haptic feedback

componentLibrary.name: Country Code Picker
componentLibrary.description: Searchable country selector with flags, dial codes, and smooth animations

componentLibrary.name: Custom Timer
componentLibrary.description: Circular countdown timer with customizable colors, size, and completion callbacks

componentLibrary.name: Dropdown Overlay
componentLibrary.description: Smart dropdown that positions itself within viewport bounds with smooth transitions

componentLibrary.name: Timeline Widget
componentLibrary.description: Animated vertical timeline with custom icons, colors, and scroll-triggered reveals

componentLibrary.name: Animated Skill Bar
componentLibrary.description: Progress bar with gradient fill, percentage label, and intersection observer trigger

highlights: Built custom Flutter widgets, animations, and complex state management (Provider, BLoC, Riverpod)
Developed serverless REST APIs with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB
Integrated AI chatbot functionality using OpenAI models into mobile apps
Implemented CI/CD pipelines for automated App Store and Play Store deployments
Built multi-platform Flutter apps running on iOS, Android, and web from a single codebase
Developed REST APIs using Node.js, Express, and MySQL for real-time data
Created interactive dashboards for real-time analytics and business intelligence
Led a small team, conducted code reviews and mentored junior developers
Delivered mobile applications for iOS and Android on a project basis
Handled full cycle: requirements, development, testing, and store deployment
Worked directly with clients to scope and ship mobile products
Built web applications and CRM/CMS systems using Django and Python
Deployed and maintained apps on AWS EC2 cloud infrastructure
Developed responsive UIs with HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, and JavaScript
